title: OpenEden issues first tokenized access to BNY's Global Short-Dated High-Yield Bond strategy
message_html: OpenEden issues first tokenized access to BNY's Global Short-Dated High-Yield Bond strategy ...
snippet: OpenEden launches HYBOND token offering onchain access to BNY Investments’ Global Short-Dated High-Yield Bond strategy.

title: Rain and Episode Six form stablecoin alliance
message_html: Rain and Episode Six form stablecoin alliance ...
snippet: Rain, the enterprise-grade infrastructure for stablecoin-powered payments, today announced a strategic partnership with Episode Six, a leading global payment technology company and card issuer processor.
